'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=9Oie8NcY1zyoyJ4a.EZSOar47gCRb39uVou4NWtUrow-1772370879-1.0.1.1-hW8wldYc.bDasBHGUAvD4RMwpKLI5qIamYF9y3gy_GA"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
